title: [ExportVerilog] Indentation level of temporaries in an #ifdef procedural region is wrong

features.name: ifdef inside initial procedural block with automatic temporaries
features.description: Code should include an initial begin block containing #ifdef directives with nested assignments that generate expression temporaries
features.snippet:
initial begin
  automatic logic [41:0] _T_3 = `THING;
  `ifdef FOO
    `ifdef BAR
      _tmp_8 = _T_3 ^ _T_3;
    `endif
  `endif
end

features.name: automatic logic declaration in procedural block
features.description: Code should include automatic logic variable declarations inside a procedural begin block
